chunks.text: Forbes AI Pioneer: Peter Norvig - EECS at Berkeley Alumnus Peter Norvig (CS Ph.D. ’86), now Director of Research at Google, is profiled in a Forbes magazine article titled “ Artificial Intelligence Pioneers: Peter Norvig, Google .” The article describes Norvig’s history and accomplishments, and outlines his thoughts on human-machine partnerships and the disparate goals of neuroscience and AI research. Categories Alumni Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
